title: Silk Touch & Fortune Jewels
description: Adds a jewel to tools to show Fortune and Silk Touch
body:
### A way to differentiate between Fortune and Silk Touch Tools! 
Blue for Fortune and white for Silk Touch.

![In-game screenshot showing each tool and its respective jewel texturee for the enchantment.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e3da5f59d74363818962df518c91e2ad76b8878.png)

_I do not intend to port this to previous versions of the game. It will work on any that support custom items model definition._

_I do not intend to add additional enchantments for additional tools._
